# Ravolution AB

> Swedish venture studio and angel investor building deep tech platforms in language learning, voice security, AI trade infrastructure, and K1–K9 education. Founded by inventor Ivan Daza (27 patents, 343 claims).

Ravolution AB operates a Build-for-Equity model, invests directly as an angel, and runs a portfolio of patented platforms — iApply, CommunicaringSchool, Rosetta Livingstone, xPortMatch, VoiceProtector, NewsToast, BizMeet, CarbonX, Partysta, It's a Fitt.

## Pages

- [Home](/en): Overview of the venture studio, portfolio, and three engagement pillars.
- [About Ivan Daza](/en/about): Founder biography, expertise, track record, and vision.
- [Services](/en/services): Platform development, product & design, AI systems, and IP/patent strategy.
- [Build for Equity](/en/build-for-equity): Partnership model — we build defensible platforms in exchange for equity.
- [Angel Investor](/en/angel-investor): Direct early-stage capital with patent strategy and technical co-founder support.
- [Invest](/en/invest): Investor landing page for qualified leads.
- [Portfolio](/en/portfolio): Operated and licensed platforms across 6+ industries.
- [Patent Strategy for Startups](/en/patent-strategy-for-startups): Guide to strategic IP for founders.
- [Technical Cofounder Alternative](/en/technical-cofounder-alternative): How we replace a missing technical co-founder.
- [Brief](/en/brief): Intake form to submit a platform concept.
- [Contact](/en/contact): Direct email and inquiry channels.
- [Blog & Podcast](/en/blog): Long-form thinking on IP, venture building, and deep tech.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/en/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](/en/terms-of-service)
- [Sales Partner](/en/sales-partner): Program for sales partners in Sweden and LATAM.
